name: Cheese Maze
short_description: Guide a clever mouse through fun puzzle mazes, dodge sneaky cats, collect cheese, and make it home safely. With 40 exciting levels and arcade-style gameplay, Cheese Maze is a brain-boosting adventure for all ages!
detailed_description:
About the Game

Cheese Maze is a fun and clever puzzle adventure for all ages! Guide a curious little mouse through a maze filled with exciting challenges and surprises. Each level is packed with tricky obstacles and creative puzzles. Think carefully to find your way out, but watch out for the sneaky Cat that’s always on the prowl! Gather every piece of delicious cheese and bring it safely home.

Can you complete every challenge and become the Maze Master?

This game was made with 💗 love and 🧀 cheese, just for YOU!

Features

  • 🐭 A brave and adorable Mouse

  • 😼😼😼 Mischievous Cats

  • ⚠️ Creative and tricky traps

  • 🧩 40 handcrafted levels

  • 🧀🧀🧀 Lots and lots of CHEESE!

  • 🧠 Fun, brain-boosting puzzles

  • 🕹️ Arcade-style gameplay for quick and exciting sessions
